description: Fragment from the bottom of a ketubba. Groom: Ṣemaḥ ha-Levi ha-Parnas. The bride's name is missing; this is not her first marriage. Part of the dowry list is preserved. The witnesses include Ḥalfon b. Saʿadya and Elʿazar b. Menaḥem, both of whom have crude handwriting.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
